body:
Our dependencies require resolving the `ode_compat_examples` environment, which is broken upon updating dependencies (due to now broken compat entries in packages that we depend on).

Resolving these compat entries is complicated because they depend on:
 - OrdinaryDiffEq (we restrict)
 - SciMLBase (we restrict)
 - RecursiveArrayTools (restricted by dependency)

Otherwise, it seems like we cannot update our dependencies for this environment, so it seems kind of pointless to maintain now.

This PR:
 - Updates the dependencies
 - Removes the ODE compat environment and performance benchmark, since that's now the only remaining job.

Just for the record, the the build on main shows:

### Rosenbrock (OrdinaryDiffEq)
```
┌──────────────────────────┬────────────┬──────────┬────────────┬────────────┬────────────┬────────────┬───────────┐
│ Function                 │     Memory │   allocs │       Time │       Time │       Time │       Time │ N-samples │
│                          │   estimate │ estimate │        min │        max │       mean │     median │           │
├──────────────────────────┼────────────┼──────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼───────────┤
│ Wfact                    │  37.88 KiB │        1 │ 257.385 ms │ 264.857 ms │ 259.031 ms │ 258.355 ms │        10 │
│ linsolve                 │    0 bytes │        0 │  60.784 ms │  62.378 ms │  61.029 ms │  60.875 ms │        10 │
│ implicit_tendency!       │  34.19 KiB │        1 │ 197.256 ms │ 200.682 ms │ 199.502 ms │ 199.367 ms │        10 │
│ remaining_tendency!      │  68.39 KiB │        3 │ 610.379 ms │ 628.611 ms │ 616.379 ms │ 615.656 ms │         8 │
│ additional_tendency!     │  34.19 KiB │        1 │ 317.687 ms │ 322.551 ms │ 320.421 ms │ 320.768 ms │        10 │
│ hyperdiffusion_tendency! │    0 bytes │        0 │ 159.271 ms │ 160.419 ms │ 159.765 ms │ 159.879 ms │        10 │
│ step!                    │ 255.30 KiB │       29 │    2.101 s │    2.101 s │    2.101 s │    2.101 s │         1 │
└──────────────────────────┴────────────┴──────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴───────────┘
```

```
├──────────────────────────┼────────────┼──────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼───────────┤
│ Wfact                    │  37.88 KiB │        1 │ 263.467 ms │ 271.684 ms │ 265.360 ms │ 264.532 ms │        10 │
│ linsolve                 │    0 bytes │        0 │  62.767 ms │  63.995 ms │  62.961 ms │  62.829 ms │        10 │
│ implicit_tendency!       │  34.19 KiB │        1 │ 203.335 ms │ 207.348 ms │ 205.819 ms │ 206.053 ms │        10 │
│ remaining_tendency!      │  68.39 KiB │        3 │ 621.156 ms │ 649.124 ms │ 630.591 ms │ 629.787 ms │         8 │
│ additional_tendency!     │  34.19 KiB │        1 │ 343.375 ms │ 366.137 ms │ 351.876 ms │ 351.953 ms │        10 │
│ hyperdiffusion_tendency! │    0 bytes │        0 │ 160.107 ms │ 169.447 ms │ 163.948 ms │ 162.879 ms │        10 │
│ step!                    │ 746.59 KiB │       74 │    5.889 s │    5.889 s │    5.889 s │    5.889 s │         1 │
└──────────────────────────┴────────────┴──────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴───────────┘
```
title: Update deps
